title: npamp_00 transcript KAT vector
description: Schema for the N-PAMP draft-00 spec/10 §3 transcript-construction Known Answer Test. A standards-anchored, NON-CIRCULAR KAT carrying a FIPS 180-4 SHA-256 anchor plus fixed frame/TLV inputs whose independent per-TLV byte-construction yields the TH_* transcript points — these are reference inputs and expected digests, not implementation output bytes.

coverage.description: What this KAT does and does not anchor.

anchored.description: Properties this vector pins (SHA-256 primitive, oracle leg, impl leg).

not_covered_here.description: Explicit non-scope (crypto realism, High/Sovereign SHA-384, Finished/CertVerify KATs).

cut_points.description: Prose definition of where each TH_* transcript point is taken in the handshake.

expected_transcript_points.description: Expected TH_* values: SHA-256 (32-byte) digests over all bytes absorbed up to each cut point.

fips180_4_sha256_abc.description: FIPS 180-4 SHA-256("abc") anchor that proves the test's hash primitive before trusting the TH points.

digest.description: Expected SHA-256 (32-byte) digest of the ASCII input.

frames.description: Ordered handshake frames whose frame-type and per-TLV bytes are absorbed into the transcript.

frame_type.description: Frame type as a 2-octet big-endian code point, written 0x followed by 4 hex digits.

tlvs.description: TLVs absorbed as Type(2 BE)||Length(2 BE)||Value at per-TLV granularity.

type.description: TLV type as a 2-octet big-endian code point, written 0x followed by 4 hex digits.

value.description: TLV value bytes, hex-encoded (even number of hex digits).

hash.description: Standard-profile transcript hash for this vector.

profile.description: N-PAMP profile fixing SHA-256 as the transcript hash.

provenance.description: Statement that the expected TH_* are produced by an independent byte-constructor, not the type under test (non-circular).

rule.description: Absorption rule: frame-type as 2-octet BE; each TLV as Type(2 BE)||Length(2 BE)||Value; point = SHA-256 over all bytes so far.

spec.description: Spec clause this KAT anchors (N-PAMP draft-00 handshake binding §3 transcript construction).
